global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a special offer.

elements.label: Red abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant red background with abstract shapes and patterns creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A prominent area at the top featuring a large, stylized product representation with a soft outline.

elements.label: Secondary product area
elements.description: A slightly smaller area below the main product display, showcasing additional product elements with a similar design.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A sleek and modern logo positioned at the top, featuring the brand name 'VantaStyle' in a bold font.

elements.label: Stylized product shape
elements.description: A stylized representation of a product, resembling a watch, with a minimalist design in the center.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A decorative element on the left side, resembling a geometric shape that adds visual interest.

elements.label: Collection announcement
elements.description: Text in the center that announces 'New collection drop' in a clear, modern font.

elements.label: Shipping offer
elements.description: Text below the collection announcement stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Product price
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€19.99' in a bold font, positioned above the call to action.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' displayed prominently at the top in a stylish font.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, positioned at the top right with the word 'SALE' in bright text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and vibrant, new collection, sale, free shipping
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main product display, collection announcement, and call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop, Free shipping over $25, €19.99, Watch now, VantaStyle, SALE
